'''Keena Devist''' was the daughter of [[Carib Devist|Carib]] and [[Lacy Devist]] and sister of [[Daberin Devist]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
